business.name: Solutions Auto Repair
business.tagline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Trust in Dallas
business.hours: Mon-Fri: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat: 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

seo.title: Solutions Auto Repair | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Solutions Auto Repair in Dallas, TX offers expert auto repair and maintenance services. From brake repair to engine diagnostics, our certified mechanics ensure your vehicle runs smoothly. Call (214) 360-0488 today!

hero.headline: Reliable Auto Repair That Keeps You Moving
hero.subheadline: From routine oil changes to complex engine diagnostics, our certified technicians deliver quality service with transparent pricing and fast turnaround.

featureSections.title: Honest Diagnostics, Expert Repairs
featureSections.body: We don't just fix cars—we build trust. Our multi-point inspection identifies issues early, and we explain every repair in plain language before any work begins. You'll never get surprised by hidden fees.
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty. Drive with confidence knowing we stand behind our work.

featureSections.title: Modern Tools, Classic Service
featureSections.body: Our shop uses the latest diagnostic equipment to quickly pinpoint issues, saving you time and money. But we never lose the personal touch—we treat every customer like a neighbor.
featureSections.cardBody: We offer online scheduling, complimentary coffee, and a comfortable waiting area. Most services completed while you wait.

home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Drivers Choose Solutions Auto Repair

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: Every technician is ASE-certified and undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll receive a clear, itemized estimate before any work. We never upsell unnecessary repairs.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: We know you need your vehicle back. Most repairs are completed same-day or within 24 hours.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction
whyChooseUs.description: Our 100% satisfaction guarantee means we won't rest until you're happy with the result.

testimonials.quote: I brought my SUV in for a strange noise, and they diagnosed it in minutes. Fair price, fast service, and they even washed my car. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: After a bad experience at a dealership, Solutions Auto restored my faith in mechanics. They explained everything and saved me hundreds.
testimonials.author: Maria L.

testimonials.quote: I've been coming here for three years. They're honest, skilled, and always on time. My whole family trusts them.
testimonials.author: David K.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Solutions Auto difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our team handles it all with precision and care. Every service is backed by our warranty and commitment to quality.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify engine issues, from check engine lights to performance problems. We then provide a clear plan for repair using quality parts and proven techniques.

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: Our technician inspects related components to pinpoint the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We perform the repair using OEM or equivalent parts, then test drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed in under an hour. Complex issues may require additional time.

faqs.question: Do you use genuine parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality OEM and aftermarket parts with warranties, and we'll discuss options with you.

services.title: Brake Service
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure stopping power you can count on.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and check for leaks.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: We replace worn pads and resurface or replace rotors as needed.

process.title: System Test
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to ensure smooth, quiet operation.

faqs.question: How often should brakes be serviced?
faqs.answer: Typically every 20,000-30,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We check them during every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft pedal. If you notice any, bring your car in immediately.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the best way to prolong engine life. We use quality oils and filters, and also check all other fluids to keep your vehicle in top shape.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We drain the old oil and replace the filter.

process.title: Add Fresh Oil
process.description: We add the correct type and amount of oil for your vehicle.

process.title: Check All Fluids
process.description: We top off coolant, brake fluid, transmission fluid, and more.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oils. We'll recommend the best option for your car.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual or ask us.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable year-round with expert AC service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor issues.

process.title: System Diagnosis
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and electrical components.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and repair leaks.

process.title: Recharge & Test
process.description: We recharge the system to manufacturer specs and verify temperature output.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We'll diagnose the exact problem.

faqs.question: How much does an AC recharge cost?
faqs.answer: Cost varies based on refrigerant type and amount needed. We offer competitive pricing and will provide an estimate upfront.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Specialists
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that gets you back on the road safely and affordably.
story: Solutions Auto Repair was founded on the belief that every driver deserves a mechanic they can trust. With over 20 years of combined experience, our team has built a reputation for integrity, skill, and exceptional customer service. We started in a small garage and grew by word-of-mouth because we treat every car as if it were our own.

Today, we serve the entire Dallas area with a state-of-the-art facility and a team of ASE-certified technicians. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and continuous training to ensure we can handle any vehicle, from sedans to trucks. But our core values remain the same: transparency, quality, and respect for our customers.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs—and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: Your time and budget matter. We communicate clearly and finish on schedule.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and give back whenever we can.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Call or stop by today for a free estimate.
